apiKey.description: Legacy flat API key. Kept for migration detection only.

defaultWorkspace.description: Default workspace key to use for tools and defaults.

startCreateBranch.description: Whether issue start should create a git branch by default: ask, true, false.

startUpdateState.description: Whether issue start should update tracker state by default: ask, true, false.

workspaces.description: Workspace profiles keyed by Linear org urlKey.

StartDecisionMode.description:
Raw config shape (what gets saved to disk). All fields optional -- only overrides are stored.

JSDoc comments on fields become `description` in the generated JSON Schema. Run `pnpm gen:schema` after changing this interface.

apiKey.description: Linear API key for this workspace.
